creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: garga
Date: Tue Nov  5 22:48:54 2013
New Revision: 332926
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332926

Log:
  . Fix DOCS install
  
  PR:		ports/183600 (based on)
  Submitted by:	nemysis <nemysis@FreeBSD.org>

Modified:
  head/devel/libslang2/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/libslang2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libslang2/Makefile	Tue Nov  5 22:46:28 2013	(r332925)
+++ head/devel/libslang2/Makefile	Tue Nov  5 22:48:54 2013	(r332926)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	libslang2
 PORTVERSION=	2.2.4
-PORTREVISION=	4
+PORTREVISION=	5
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://space.mit.edu/pub/davis/slang/v${PORTVERSION:R}/ \
 		ftp://ftp.fu-berlin.de/pub/unix/misc/slang/v${PORTVERSION:R}/ \
@@ -54,4 +54,11 @@ post-patch:
 		${WRKSRC}/src/Makefile.in \
 		${WRKSRC}/slsh/Makefile.in
 
+post-install:
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+.for f in NEWS changes.txt
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${f} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+.endfor
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}/doc && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR})
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
